questionPatterns.combinationsHelp: Define specific questions when certain secondary keywords are found. Secondary keywords: fiyat, metrekare, konum, ozellik, oran, sure, basvuru, muafiyet
questionPatterns.defaultQuestionHelp: Use {topic} as placeholder. Used when no combination matches.
questionPatterns.keywordsHelp: Use | to separate keywords. These match content text.
questionPatterns.title: Question Patterns
questionPatterns.titleKeywordsHelp: Additional keywords to match in titles only.

rag.batchSizeHelp: Number of items to load when clicking "Load More" (recommended: 3-5)
rag.citationWarning: Citations are disabled. The system will skip semantic search and only generate a direct summary response, improving performance significantly.
rag.hybridSearchHelp: When enabled, combines semantic similarity with keyword search for better results
rag.keywordBoostHelp: Boosts exact keyword matches in search results. Highlighted keywords appear in yellow tags.
rag.maxResultsHelp: Total sources to fetch from database (0 = citations off)
rag.minResultsHelp: Initial number of sources to display (0 = citations off)
rag.similarityHelp: Minimum similarity score for search results (0-1). Lower = more results, but less relevant.
rag.strictModeHelp: Only use information from sources. No interpretation or added content. Provides direct quotes and structured format for legal/accurate responses.
rag.summaryMaxLengthHelp: Maximum characters for AI-generated summaries (recommended: 800-1200 for markdown formatting)
rag.title: RAG Configuration
